nameEn: ACM Symposium on Virtual Reality Software and Technology
description: An ACM symposium on virtual reality software and technology, covering VR/AR interaction, 3D user interfaces, and immersive systems. Alongside IEEE VR, VRST is a key venue in the VR field, with a particular focus on software and technical implementation aspects.

bestPapers.paperTitle: Stand Alone or Stay Together: An In-situ Experiment of Mixed-Reality Applications in Embryonic Anatomy Education
bestPapers.authors: Schott, Kunz, Heinrich, Mandel, Albrecht, Braun-Dullaeus & Hansen

bestPapers.paperTitle: See It and Hear It: Multimodal Guidance in MR-Based Neurosurgical Simulation for Skill Retention
bestPapers.authors: Cascarano, Loretti, Zanuttini, Giunchi, Bovo, Hajahmadi, Vallasciani, Martinoni & Marfia

descriptionKo: 가상현실 소프트웨어와 기술에 특화된 ACM 심포지엄으로, VR/AR 인터랙션, 3D 사용자 인터페이스, 몰입형 시스템 등을 다룹니다. IEEE VR과 함께 VR 분야의 주요 학회이며, 소프트웨어와 기술적 구현에 더 초점을 맞춘 것이 특징입니다.
descriptionEn: An ACM symposium on virtual reality software and technology, covering VR/AR interaction, 3D user interfaces, and immersive systems. Alongside IEEE VR, VRST is a key venue in the VR field, with a particular focus on software and technical implementation aspects.
